news.listTitle: Casinogame is ready to play at SigmaAsia Manila

news.content:

One of the highlights of the Sigma Asia 2025 is the splendid debut of Casinogame, a fresh, new player in the live casino gaming market. Designed for today's fast-paced, mobile-centric lifestyles, Casinogame envisions itself as a key provider of live casino, reshaping the future gaming not just in Asia but across the globe. With its groundbreaking mobile-first approach, vertical gameplay optimization, and extravagant live dealer game studios dedicated to the tastes of the modern audience, Casinogame promises to bring the gaming experience to a whole new level. Its platform offers a seamless, high-performance experience with its marvelous gameplay, solid graphics, and unmatched ease of play and immersion, placing its users at the heart of the action like never experienced before.

"Casinogame isn't just another live dealer platform—it's a game-changer. We've combined cutting-edge technology, elegant design, and rock-solid integrity to deliver a live casino experience that's second to none."

Dr. Mon Kor, Managing Director of Casinogame, interviewed at Sigma Asia 2025

Casinogame's live dealer rooms are well-crafted with cinematic quality and extravagant aesthetics that will surely set a record as a visual standard in the gaming industry. Not only that, but the live dealer game is also streamed with high quality audio to ensure players to be fully engaged from the first deal to the final bet. Backed by top-tier regulatory licenses and certified by BMM Testlabs, Casinogame guarantees a fair, secure, and transparent gaming experience for its customers. This commitment to integrity and compliance will surely make Casinogame one amongst the most trusted platforms in the gaming market. As live gaming continues to expand across global markets, Casinogame stands at the forefront—ready to lead with innovation, trust, and style.

About Casinogame: Real Mobile Casino, Real Fun, Real Games

Casinogame is a next-generation live dealer game provider dedicated in delivering an exceptional mobile-first experience to its customers. With secure, fully licensed operations, independent certification, and a passion for innovation, Casinogame aims to bring the future of live casino gaming to the next level.

news.listTitle: Casinogame Nominated for Best Live Casino Provider at SiGMA Asia Awards 2025
news.contentTitle: In a remarkable milestone for a newcomer, Casinogame has been officially nominated for Best Live Casino Provider at the prestigious SiGMA Asia Awards 2025.
news.content:
In a remarkable milestone for a newcomer, Casinogame has been officially nominated for Best Live Casino Provider at the prestigious SiGMA Asia Awards 2025. This nomination comes just weeks after the company's grand debut at SiGMA Asia, where it made waves with its next-generation, mobile-first live casino platform.

The SiGMA Asia Awards recognize excellence and innovation in the iGaming industry, with the Best Live Casino Provider category spotlighting companies that deliver outstanding live gaming experiences through technology, design, and player engagement. For Casinogame, being shortlisted in such a competitive field is a strong endorsement of its groundbreaking approach and rapid impact on the market.

Launched earlier this year, Casinogame has quickly gained industry attention with its mobile-first design philosophy, vertical gameplay optimization, and cinematically styled live dealer studios. Designed to meet the demands of modern, mobile-focused players, the platform delivers high-quality streaming, seamless user interaction, and immersive visuals that rival any global competitor.

"To be nominated for Best Live Casino Provider at SiGMA Asia is a true honor"

Said Dr. Mon Kor, Managing Director of Casinogame.

"This recognition reflects the passion, innovation, and dedication our team has poured into building a platform that pushes the boundaries of live gaming. We're thrilled to be considered among the best in the industry."

Casinogame's live dealer offerings are designed with meticulous attention to both form and function. Players enjoy a premium gaming environment supported by BMM Testlabs certification and top-tier licensing, ensuring fairness, transparency, and trust. Its studios boast a lavish yet modern aesthetic, streaming real-time action with crystal-clear video and audio to audiences across the Asia-Pacific and beyond. With the live casino sector seeing rapid growth in Asia, Casinogame's nomination signals not only its immediate success but also its potential to become a long-term leader in the space. The SiGMA Asia Awards ceremony, which will take place later this year, will bring together the region's top gaming brands to celebrate innovation and achievement. Whether it takes home the trophy or not, Casinogame's nomination already marks it as a standout in 2025—a bold new force redefining the live gaming experience.

news.listTitle: Casinogame Signs Strategic API Integration Agreement with DST Gaming
news.contentTitle: In a significant move to strengthen its content offerings and expand its global footprint, Casinogame has officially signed an API integration agreement with DST Gaming.
news.content:
In a significant move to strengthen its content offerings and expand its global footprint, Casinogame has officially signed an API integration agreement with DST Gaming, a well-established iGaming platform provider and content aggregator. This partnership marks a key step in bringing Casinogame's premium live dealer experience to a wider international audience.

Through this integration, Casinogame will deliver its full suite of mobile-first, vertically optimized live dealer games — including classics like Baccarat, Roulette, and Dragon Tiger, as well as popular Asian titles such as Sic Bo, HiLo, and Pokdeng — directly through DST Gaming's robust platform ecosystem. The collaboration opens doors for multiple operators across Asia and beyond to access and feature Casinogame's content effortlessly.

DST Gaming is recognized for its seamless connectivity and powerful distribution network, serving online casino operators with trusted aggregation services. By integrating Casinogame's content, DST Gaming further diversifies its live dealer portfolio, giving its operator partners access to an award-caliber gaming experience designed for modern, mobile-first players.

All games supplied through this integration are licensed by top-tier jurisdictions and are certified by BMM Testlabs, assuring DST Gaming's operators and their players of fair play, security, and compliance. Casinogame's proprietary platform is renowned for its high-definition streaming, low-latency performance, and visually immersive live studios — ensuring an authentic casino atmosphere in any digital environment.

With API integration now underway, both Casinogame and DST Gaming are set to deliver a winning combination of content quality, operational efficiency, and player satisfaction. This partnership strengthens Casinogame's strategy of forging strong alliances with leading industry platforms, further cementing its position as a top-tier live dealer content provider in the global iGaming space.

news.listTitle: CasinoGame Crowned Best Live Table Game Provider 2025 at SiGMA Euro-Med
news.contentTitle: At this year's prestigious SiGMA Euro-Med Awards, held in Malta, CasinoGame proudly received the title of "Best Live Table Game Provider 2025."
news.content:
At this year's prestigious SiGMA Euro-Med Awards, held in Malta, CasinoGame proudly received the title of "Best Live Table Game Provider 2025." This award is more than a trophy — it is a recognition of CasinoGame's commitment to innovation, authenticity, and excellence in the ever-evolving world of live dealer gaming.

A Milestone Achievement

Winning this award represents a milestone for CasinoGame, marking years of dedication to delivering premium live casino experiences to players across the globe. Competing alongside some of the most established names in the industry, CasinoGame stood out for its immersive live dealer tables, mobile-first design approach, and seamless streaming technology that transforms traditional gameplay into next-generation entertainment.

Real Game, Real Fun

Guided by the vision "Real Game, Real Fun," CasinoGame continues to redefine the boundaries of live casino gaming. Our portfolio is a blend of timeless classics and regional favourites:

  • Baccarat in premium VIP settings, enhanced with exciting side bets like Panda & Dragon.
  • Roulette, streamed with cinematic quality for a truly authentic casino atmosphere.
  • Popular Asian games such as Sic Bo, Dragon Tiger, HiLo, Pokdeng, and Hoo Hey How, ensuring strong engagement across diverse markets.
  • Innovative features including the Progressive Jackpot, designed to keep players entertained while providing operators with retention-driven growth.
Technology Meets Trust

At the heart of our success is not only innovation, but trust. Operating under an Anjouan B2B license and fully certified by BMM Testlabs, CasinoGame guarantees compliance, fairness, and reliability for all partners. Our AI-powered fraud detection systems, which include advanced card and dice scanning technology, ensure a secure environment for players and operators alike.

Building a Global Presence

From our live dealer studios in Asia to our growing presence in Europe, CasinoGame is rapidly expanding its footprint. The recognition at SiGMA Euro-Med underscores our ability to serve a global market, balancing cultural authenticity with cutting-edge digital performance.

Looking ahead, CasinoGame is preparing for a strong lineup of international showcases, including SiGMA Central Europe in Rome, 2025. The event is an opportunity to demonstrate our latest innovations and connect with operators, partners, and industry leaders who share our passion for the future of live gaming.

The Future of Live Gaming

For CasinoGame, this award is both an achievement and a starting point. As mobile consumption continues to shape player behavior, our mission remains clear: to create live dealer experiences that are vertical-first, immersive, and endlessly engaging. With a strong foundation of trust, compliance, and innovation, CasinoGame is ready to continue shaping the future of live entertainment.

CasinoGame — Real Game. Real Fun.

#CasinoGame #SiGMAEuroMed2025 #BestLiveTableGameProvider #LiveCasino

news.listTitle: CasinoGame to Unveil Award-Winning Live Casino Solutions and BetBuddy AI Assistant at SiGMA Europe 2025
news.contentTitle: CasinoGame to Unveil Award-Winning Live Casino Solutions and "BetBuddy" AI Assistant at SiGMA Europe 2025 in Rome
news.content:
CasinoGame, a leading Asian live casino solutions provider, today announced its participation in SiGMA Europe 2025, taking place in Rome later this month. Fresh off its recent recognition, the company will be exhibiting at Stand 5027, where it will showcase a unique portfolio of localized Asian games, preview a new AI-powered game assistant, and demonstrate the premium technology that sets it apart in the global market.

CasinoGame enters the major European iGaming event on a high note, having been named Best Live Table Game Provider 2025 at the SiGMA Euro-Med Awards last September. This prestigious win highlights the company's commitment to delivering high-quality, authentic, and immersive live casino experiences.

"Our team is thrilled to bring CasinoGame's unique blend of technology and entertainment to one of Europe's most important iGaming events,"

said Mon, Managing Director of CasinoGame.

"Winning the SiGMA Euro-Med award confirms that our focus on quality and localization resonates globally. We are distinct because we don't just stream games; we craft experiences that authentically reflect local player preferences while maintaining top-tier reliability and compliance standards."

What to Expect at SiGMA Europe

At SiGMA Europe, CasinoGame will highlight the content and features that differentiate its offering:

  • Localized Game Portfolio: The company focuses on authentic, culturally-tuned Asian classics like Pokdeng, Hi Lo, and Fish-Prawn-Crab, alongside popular global titles like Baccarat, Roulette, Dragon Tiger, and Sic Bo.
  • Introducing BetBuddy: The AI Game Assistant: Visitors to Stand 5027 will get an exclusive preview of BetBuddy, a new AI-powered game assistant feature set to launch shortly after the event. Designed to enhance the player experience through data-driven insights and real-time support, BetBuddy reinforces CasinoGame's commitment to innovation.
  • Cutting-Edge Technology: CasinoGame's proprietary platform ensures ultra-low latency streaming, intuitive interfaces, and scalable integration options for online gaming platforms, making it an ideal partner for operators in both regulated and emerging markets.

CasinoGame's approach is built on deep partnership. "We don't just provide live dealer solutions - we work closely with our clients to help them grow sustainably in a competitive, fast-evolving market," the company stated.

Building Long-Term Partnerships

The company aims to connect with operators, aggregators, and platform providers seeking to strengthen their live casino offerings. CasinoGame's participation at SiGMA Europe 2025 underscores its commitment to expanding its presence in Europe and building long-term collaborations with licensed operators and technology partners around the world.

Visit CasinoGame at SiGMA Europe 2025: Stand 5027

news.listTitle: Experience the Thrill of Pok Deng with Casinogame
news.contentTitle: Introducing Pok Deng — Now Available at Casinogame. One of Asia's most exciting and fast-growing card games is here.
news.content:
Casinogame proudly introduces Pok Deng, one of Asia's most exciting and fast-growing card games. Pok Deng has become a favorite among players thanks to its simple rules, fast-paced gameplay, and thrilling winning combinations. Now, players around the world can enjoy this popular Southeast Asian classic through the Casinogame platform.

What is Pok Deng?

Pok Deng (sometimes called Pok Kao) is an easy-to-learn card game where the objective is simple: beat the dealer by getting a hand value closest to 9. The game shares similarities with baccarat, but it comes with unique twists and exciting bonus combinations that make every round even more thrilling.

Players start with two cards, and the hand value is calculated based on the last digit of the total. Special combinations — such as pairs, matching suits, or certain three-card hands — can trigger bonus payouts known as "Deng" multipliers, giving players the chance to increase their winnings.

The best part? Rounds are quick and action-packed, allowing players to jump straight into the fun without complicated rules or long waiting times.

Why Players Love Pok Deng

Pok Deng is more than just a card game — it's part of Southeast Asian culture. In Thailand, it has long been played during gatherings with friends and family, making it both nostalgic and entertaining.

Today, Pok Deng is quickly gaining popularity on online casino platforms because it offers:

  • Simple and easy-to-understand gameplay
  • Fast rounds for nonstop excitement
  • Exciting Deng multiplier combinations
  • A fresh alternative to games like Blackjack or Roulette
A Perfect Addition for Casino Platforms

With Pok Deng now part of the Casinogame portfolio, operators can introduce a game that strongly appeals to the Southeast Asian market while also offering something new and exciting for global players.

Its quick gameplay, cultural appeal, and rewarding payout mechanics make Pok Deng a powerful addition to any online casino lineup.

Bring the thrill of one of Asia's most beloved card games to your platform and let players experience the fast, exciting world of Pok Deng with Casinogame.

#CasinoGame #PokDeng #LiveCasino #AsianGaming #MobileFirst #RealGameRealFun
